notes: STUB — constraints not yet sourced from Mistral's docs. This file exists to demonstrate the extension pattern: any contributor can drop a profile here. Findings that rely on it are flagged by meta/profile-unverified until verified:true. To verify: fill toolName.pattern, toolName.maxLength, toolDescription.maxLength, and the inputSchema block from https://docs.mistral.ai/capabilities/function_calling/, then add `source` + `lastVerified` and flip `verified` to true.
